nasb.text: In the same way, you wives, be submissive to your own husbands so that even if any of them are disobedient to the word, they may be won without a word by the behavior of their wives,

esv.text: Likewise, wives, be subject to your own husbands, so that even if some do not obey the word, they may be won without a word by the conduct of their wives,

cnv.text: 照樣，你們作妻子的，要順服自己的丈夫，好使不信道的丈夫受到感動，不是因著你們的言語，而是因著你們的生活，

csbs.text: 同样，你们做妻子的，要服从自己的丈夫。这样，即使有不肯信从这话语的丈夫，他们也会被感化过来，不是因着妻子的话语，而是因着妻子的品行，
